description: grendha's high quality sandals capture the sultry summer's essence, the fuss-free design and flirty adornments give a street-chic vibe. Showcase these flats with cropped pants and a pastel hued fitted shirt.UpperThong style rubber straps with a flower embellishmentForest green straps and footbedSmooth footbed with printed floral patterningOutsoleShort, stacked heel with perforations and grooves all overFloral grooves on the forefoot and midfootSandal careWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust
